description: US-415 hover output eval — golden cases over the bundled gst-3.2.5 kernel (facts-only). Drives the real hoverAt provider with a HoverContext resolved from the bundled KernelIndexService (no gst, no VS Code). The `▮` marks the cursor. Metric: `expectIncludes` substrings must all appear in the rendered Markdown; `expectAbsent` substrings must not. Pins user-observable hover content per symbol kind (US-414 lesson). Bundled = facts-only, so no comment prose appears.

cases.name: AC1 selector hover shows signature + a kernel implementor + a fence
AC1 keyword selector renders keyword parts
AC1 bundled (reference) kernel carries NO comment prose
AC2 class hover shows the full superclass chain
AC2 Object hover shows the root (no superclass)
AC3 instance variable shows kind + declaration site
AC3 block parameter is reported as a parameter
AC4 radix integer decodes to decimal
AC4 binary radix decodes to decimal
AC4 scaled decimal shows value + scale
